name: philosophy-dialogue
description: 🔥 243 位思想家跨时空对话。6 种模式：对抗辩论/启发探索/舌战群儒/楚河汉界/双人论战/雄辩天下杯赛。scripts/含可选杯赛角色分配脚本，比赛数据存于用户 memory/目录。Philosophy dialogue system with 6 modes. Optional tournament scripts. Match data stored in user workspace.

optionalDependencies.python: >=3.6 (only for scripts/tournament-allocator.py, not required for core functionality)
